| # | Primitive | Source | Why |
|---|---|---|---|
| 18 | Dynamic permission rules (CC-as-OS) | Obs #22526 | Replace static PermissionDialog with runtime policy engine |

**Reason:** This addresses the critical 'static vs. dynamic rules' bottleneck. Implementing dynamic permissions enables 'CC-as-OS' capability, allowing the system to enforce 78 context-aware rules without manual updates, directly supporting the #2 assimilation priority.
reason: Fills the pending gap for dynamic permission management, solving the static rules limitation and enabling secure, context-aware execution.
